en.question: Find the mode of: 5, 7, 8, 5, 9, 7, 10, 5, 7, 5.
en.explanation: Frequency: 5 appears 4 times, 7 appears 3 times. Mode = 5.

en.question: The median of 12,18,24,x,36,40,48 (ascending) is 30. Find x.
en.explanation: 7 terms, 4th is median. 4th term is x, so x=30.

en.question: The mean of 20 observations is 45. If each is increased by 5, what is the new mean?
en.explanation: When each observation increased by constant, mean increases by same. New mean=50.

hi.question: 20 प्रेक्षणों का माध्य 45, प्रत्येक में 5 जोड़ें। नया माध्य?
hi.explanation: प्रत्येक में 5 जोड़ने से माध्य भी 5 बढ़ेगा=50।

en.question: The mean of five numbers is 30. Four are 28,32,25,35. Find the fifth.
The mean of 10 observations is 20. If each is multiplied by 2, what is the new mean?
en.explanation: Mean also multiplied by k. New mean = 20×2 = 40.

hi.question: 10 प्रेक्षणों का माध्य 20, प्रत्येक को 2 से गुणा करें। नया माध्य?
